ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-15-26 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Alex Lagodzinski As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substituting Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff; For Leave To File First Amended Complaint; And To Add Previously Sued Roe Defendant To The First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Not contested, no appearances, and the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Petitioner's Motion for Order Substituting Alex Lagodzinski, as Successor-in-Interest to, and Substituting Successor-in-Interest for, Deceased Plaintiff; for Leave to File First Amended Complaint; to Add Legal Heirs (1) Alex Lagodzinski, (2) Frank Lagodzinski Jr, and (3) Jayme Ladogzinski as wrongful death plaintiffs, to Add Deborah Roe 1 as a defendant; to Add Existing Defendants as Parties to the First through Fourth Causes of Action; (1) General Electric Company; (2) Air & Liquid Systems Corporation; (3) Asbestos Corporation Limited; (4) Redco Corporation (FKA Crane Co.); (5) Imo Industries LLC; (6) Metropolitan Life Insurance Company; and (7) Paramount Global, F/K/A Viacomcbs Inc., F/K/A Cbs Corporation, A Delaware Corporation, F/K/A Viacom Inc., Successor By Merger To Cbs Corporation, A Pennsylvania Corporation, F/K/A Westinghouse Electric Corporation; and to Add Existing Defendants as Parities to the Fist through Sixth Causes of Action; (1) Foster Wheeler LLC (FKA Foster Wheeler Corporation); and (2) Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc. is GRANTED under C.C.P. Sections 377.20, 377.60, 377.62(b), and 473. No opposition filed. As of the date of the granting of Petitioner's motion, the First Amended Complaint is deemed served on all Defendants who have previously appeared.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (304/EPS)
